summary_zh: 为海外旅人量身定制的中国深度行程，从云贵高原到香格里拉，由匠庐、松赞等顶级合作伙伴落地。
summary_en: Bespoke inbound journeys across China — from the Yunnan-Guizhou plateau to Shangri-la, anchored by Jianglu, Songtsam and curated partners.
body_zh:
野路逸行（Wildroad）是 WR Journeys 的入境旗舰品牌，面向海外旅人甄选中国深度行程。我们不做走马观花，每一条线路都用慢栖锚定 — 在贵州山野住三晚、在云南秘境住四晚、在西藏边境停一周。住宿都来自匠庐、松赞、悦榕庄等深耕本土的精品酒店品牌。

我们之所以能做出这些线路，是因为我们的创始人 Iori SHAN 在中国酒店行业深耕十余年，与几乎所有头部精品酒店主理人保持着直接关系。我们不卖标准产品 — 每一段旅程都按 family / couple / solo / kids 的画像独立设计，由真人顾问全程跟单。
body_en:
Wildroad is WR Journeys' flagship inbound brand, hand-picking deep-China journeys for international travellers. No drive-by sightseeing — every route is anchored on slow stays: three nights in a Guizhou stone village, four nights in a Yunnan boutique retreat, a full week along the Tibetan plateau. Lodging comes from Jianglu, Songtsam, Banyan Tree and other domestically-rooted boutique hospitality brands.

We can build these journeys because our founder, Iori SHAN, has spent over a decade inside China's hospitality industry and maintains direct relationships with the founders of nearly every leading boutique brand. We don't sell standard packages — every itinerary is shaped around the traveller (family / couple / solo / with kids) and followed end-to-end by a real human advisor.

summary_zh: 面向国内高净值客户的全球出境定制，覆盖欧亚非美主流目的地及小众秘境。
summary_en: Outbound bespoke travel for China's high-net-worth travellers across Europe, Asia, Africa and the Americas.
body_zh:
万德（Wanderway）是 WR Journeys 的出境定制品牌，面向中国高净值旅行者。我们覆盖欧洲（瑞士 / 意大利 / 法国 / 希腊）、东南亚（泰国 / 印尼 / 马代）、东非野奢（坦桑尼亚 safari）、中东（迪拜 / 摩洛哥）、日本与北美主线，也开发普通 OTA 上买不到的小众秘境。

万德的核心竞争力是供应链：和 Aman、Six Senses、Banyan Tree、Como、Soneva 等顶奢集团有直签价格；东非 safari 与 Andbeyond、Singita 等有 sub-agent 关系；马代 / 泰国头部水疗度假村可拿到非公开 promo。所有报价都是一事一议，按你的出行画像（蜜月 / 亲子 / 商务 / 摄影 / 美食）单独搭配。
body_en:
Wanderway is WR Journeys' outbound brand for China's high-net-worth travellers. We cover Europe (Switzerland / Italy / France / Greece), Southeast Asia (Thailand / Indonesia / Maldives), East African safaris (Tanzania), the Middle East (Dubai / Morocco), Japan and North America, alongside off-OTA hidden destinations.

Our edge is supply: direct contracts with Aman, Six Senses, Banyan Tree, Como and Soneva; sub-agent relationships with Andbeyond and Singita for safari; off-public promo access at top Maldives / Thailand resorts. Every quote is bespoke, shaped around the traveller's brief — honeymoon, family, business, photography, gastronomy.

tagline_zh: 中国精品酒店与9条甄选线路
summary_zh: 深耕中国西南的精品酒店品牌，9 条主题线路覆盖贵州、云南、广西。
summary_en: Boutique hotel collection in southwest China with 9 curated thematic routes across Guizhou, Yunnan and Guangxi.
body_zh: 匠庐是 WR Journeys 在中国西南最重要的精选合作伙伴，目前在贵州、云南、香格里拉拥有 9 个精品酒店项目，从布依族石头城堡到藏区高原山居，每一家都有强烈的在地文化叙事。我们为它甄选了 9 条线路，把多家匠庐酒店串成一条完整的旅程 — 三宿一线、跨海拔的避暑史诗、雪山下的红酒庄园。
body_en: Jianglu is WR Journeys' most important curated partner in southwest China, with nine boutique properties across Guizhou, Yunnan and Shangri-la — from Buyi stone castles to Tibetan-plateau mountain retreats, each anchored in strong local cultural narratives. We've curated nine routes that thread multiple Jianglu lodges into single coherent journeys: three lodges on one route, summer escapes across altitude gradients, snow-mountain vineyards.

summary_zh: 扎根藏区文化的精品酒店与小环线，覆盖梅里、香格里拉、稻城亚丁。
summary_en: Tibet-rooted boutique hotels and small-group circuits across Meili, Shangri-la and Yading.
body_zh:
松赞是中国藏区最具代表性的精品酒店品牌，由白马多吉先生在 2000 年于香格里拉创立，至今深耕川滇藏二十余年。WR Journeys 与松赞合作开发跨梅里、稻城亚丁、然乌湖的小环线 — 全部走松赞自营山居，每晚换城但不换品牌，行程节奏由专业领队和当地藏族司机协同把握。

松赞线路的核心价值不只是住得好，更是 — 由当地人带你进入当地文化。我们与松赞的合作覆盖松赞林卡、松赞绿谷、松赞茨中、松赞梅里、松赞奔子栏等系列酒店。
body_en:
Songtsam is China's most iconic Tibetan-plateau boutique hospitality brand, founded by Mr. Baima Doji in Shangri-la in 2000 and rooted across Sichuan / Yunnan / Tibet for over two decades. WR Journeys partners with Songtsam to build small circuits across Meili, Yading and Ranwu Lake — all anchored on Songtsam-owned lodges, with the brand experience preserved across every overnight transfer.

The core value of a Songtsam route isn't just the lodging — it's being led into local culture by people who belong to it. Our collaboration spans Songtsam Lincang, Linka, Cizhong, Meili, Benzilan and the wider lodge collection.

summary_zh: MSC 集团旗下顶级邮轮品牌，地中海与极地航线，以 slow stay 哲学重新定义海上奢华。
summary_en: MSC group's slow-luxury ocean brand, Mediterranean and polar routes redefining the cruise experience.

summary_zh: 巴厘岛、普吉、苏梅等东南亚顶级私人别墅运营商，250+ 套带管家服务的整租别墅。
summary_en: Top private villa operator across Bali, Phuket, Samui — 250+ fully-staffed villas.

tagline_zh: 北海道二世谷雪季别墅
summary_zh: 北海道二世谷区域顶级雪季别墅运营商，70+ 套滑雪季整租别墅。
summary_en: Premier Niseko ski-season villa operator — 70+ chalets across Hirafu, Hanazono and Annupuri.

summary_zh: 苍山洱海之间的精品酒店，由建筑师主理的当代白族美学空间。
summary_en: Boutique retreat between Cangshan and Erhai, contemporary Bai-architecture by a master architect.
